Vendor sold diamonds

# Jan 01 2026 at 2:27 PM Rating: Good
nytmare
Sage
1,350 posts
The Burning Lands expansion gives us a vendor with an unlimited supply of diamonds -- Sagacious Great Jade [ Merchant ], in Stratos.
▲ Page top
uses for diamonds
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2010 at 2:50 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1719792988335
679 posts
Under diamond and imbued diamond there is no mention of the act of imbuing a diamond. This is a class and deity limited ability. Cleric, and Shaman classes of the deity Mithaniel Marr are empowered to imbue diamonds with the use of the imbue diamond spell. These imbued diamonds are then used to make the above recipes. Cleric, Druid and Shaman classes of other gods have other gems that they can imbue which in turn have other recipes that can be made. My Cleric of Rodcet Nife imbues Pearls. My cleric of Bristlebane imbues peridots. My Druid of Karana imbues Plains Pebbles. I clicked on the link to the the spell information for imbue diamond and found a post (by agonizer 2/22/203 and updated 1/28/2007) which anyone interested should read because it is the most complete list I have ever seen, but is still incomplete. I did not link it because so many links quit working or the website closes down.

Bazaar Price
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2007 at 2:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592310666403
78 posts
Offered frequently for 200 â€“ 400p in the Bazaar. Average price range being 250 â€“ 300p. Seen full stacks (100) sell in this range every couple months. Early in the year the prices were at the higher end 400p, but in recent weeks a glut on the market makes them available in this wider range. Someone is buying them right now (Bristlebane) in barter mode at 50p. (/barter when in the bazaar zone)
▲ Page top
That's kind of funny.
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2010 at 5:46 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1690762596291
Sage
1,308 posts
Because they sell to a vendor for more than 50 plat. I've seen the same thing on the Nameless, as recently as last week. Peopel /barter for blue diamonds for 150 plat...and they sell to vendor for more than that. I normally sell my blue diamonds for 250. They go rather fast, as they are the cheapest in the baz. The other knuckleheads are selling theirs for 300 - 350.

▲ Page top
RE: farming
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2004 at 8:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1717373792495
55 posts
When leveling my pally I found that a lot of diamonds (raw, regular, and blue) drop at the entracne in Crypt of Decay...off of the Puslings and others. Don't expect to solo these mobs much as they are level 60, hit pretty hard, and it's pretty easy to get adds here. Exp pre-60/61 is great and post 60/61 its nice for AA...plus there is rarely anyone in this zone on my server. Just my thoughts...
▲ Page top
RE: farming
QuoteReply
# May 04 2004 at 8:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591802058407
5 posts
the best place to farm em is in crystal caverns.prettly low lvl mobs there.bout 35.they drop fairly often.
▲ Page top
RE: farming
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2005 at 11:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593374519737
View User Forum
165 posts
Actually I don't think diamonds of any kind drop in Crystal Caverns, but "chipped diamond" and many other "chipped" gems drop. These sell for the price of the original gem, but the do not stack and obviously can't be used in the same tradeskills.

▲ Page top
RE: Help
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2002 at 1:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1611533819471
69 posts
This drops off just about every high-level encounter in the game. It is a rare drop, however, so don't waltz into SolB and expect it to drop off each imp you see.

I have had a diamond drop off imps, as mentioned, in SolB, off Frenzy and Rasta in LGuk, off almost everything (especially named) in Seb, all over Velks, Giant guards in Permafrost, one came from a mermaid in Kedge, AC dropped one in OOT. I won't even mention the Planes (but there you're looking for Blue Diamonds). If you want a Diamond for resist gear or whatever, look to high-level zones, and then start killing. They'll drop soon enough.

I wish Jacinth's dropped as easily as Diamonds
▲ Page top
RE: Help
QuoteReply
